title: Office Supply Notice
passage:
To all staff,

Starting next month, office supplies will be ordered through the new internal request form. The form is available on the company portal and should be submitted by Thursday afternoon for delivery the following week. This change is intended to reduce duplicate orders and help the administration team track monthly expenses more accurately.

If your department needs an item urgently, please contact the administration desk before submitting the form.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the notice?

choices.text: To announce a new ordering procedure

questions.explanation: 本文では、来月から社内申請フォームで備品を注文する変更が案内されています。

questions.prompt: When should the request form be submitted for delivery the following week?

choices.text: At the end of each month

questions.explanation: 本文に should be submitted by Thursday afternoon と明記されています。

title: Internal Memo 1
passage:
To all team members,

The office will update its inventory procedure next month. The new process is designed to make daily work easier and reduce repeated requests. Team leaders will explain the details during a short meeting on Tuesday morning. Staff members who cannot attend should read the summary posted on the internal portal.

Please send any questions to the administration desk by Friday afternoon.

questions.prompt: What is the memo mainly about?

choices.text: A change to the inventory procedure

questions.explanation: 本文は inventory 手順の更新について説明しています。

questions.prompt: By when should questions be sent?
questions.explanation: 本文末に by Friday afternoon と明記されています。

title: Customer Service Desk Move
passage:
To all employees,

The customer service desk will move from the first floor to the north side of the lobby on July 8. The new location will give visitors a clearer path from the main entrance and reduce crowding near the elevators. Signs will be placed in the lobby during the first week of the change.

Staff members who regularly meet visitors should review the updated floor map on the company portal before Friday.

questions.prompt: What is the notice mainly about?
questions.explanation: 本文では customer service desk がロビー北側へ移動すると説明されています。

questions.prompt: What should some staff members do before Friday?
questions.explanation: 本文末に review the updated floor map ... before Friday とあります。

title: Online Order Policy
passage:
Dear team,

Beginning next Monday, customers who place online orders will receive a confirmation message before their items are prepared. The message will include the pickup time, the order number, and any notes from the store. This step is intended to reduce cancelled orders caused by incorrect pickup dates.

For orders of more than $100, the usual handling fee will be waived automatically at checkout.

questions.prompt: Why is the confirmation message being added?
questions.explanation: 本文に reduce cancelled orders caused by incorrect pickup dates とあります。

questions.prompt: When will the handling fee be waived?

choices.text: When an order is picked up early
When an order is more than $100
When a customer calls the store
When a message is not received

questions.explanation: 本文末に For orders of more than $100, the usual handling fee will be waived とあります。

title: Maintenance Access Notice
passage:
To employees in the east wing,

Technicians will inspect the ventilation system above the workstations on Wednesday morning. To give the technicians enough space, please remove personal items from the top shelves before leaving on Tuesday. Computers and chairs do not need to be moved.

Employees who need a quiet place during the inspection may use the temporary work area in Training Room B.

questions.prompt: Why are employees asked to clear the top shelves?

choices.text: To help technicians reach the ventilation system
To make room for training materials

questions.explanation: 換気設備の点検のため、技術者が作業できるスペースを確保する必要があると読み取れます。

questions.prompt: Where can employees work during the inspection?
questions.explanation: 本文末に temporary work area in Training Room B とあります。

title: Training Schedule Update
passage:
To all branch managers,

The product knowledge training originally planned for June 12 has been moved to June 19. The change was necessary because the large conference room will be used for a regional sales meeting on the original date. The training agenda and instructor will remain the same.

Please remind your team members to confirm their attendance through the learning portal by Monday.

questions.prompt: Which session has been moved?
questions.explanation: 本文冒頭に product knowledge training が June 19 に変更されたとあります。

questions.prompt: Why was the date changed?

choices.text: The instructor is unavailable all month
The conference room is needed for another meeting
The agenda has not been approved

questions.explanation: 本文に the large conference room will be used for a regional sales meeting とあります。

title: Invoice Payment Reminder
passage:
Dear Ms. Ortega,

This is a reminder that invoice 4587 for the design consultation is due on May 30. The invoice was sent to your accounting department on May 10, along with a copy of the final project summary. Payment can be made by bank transfer or by credit card through the client portal.

If payment has already been completed, please disregard this message.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of the message?

choices.text: To remind a client about a payment

questions.explanation: 本文は支払期限が近い請求書について知らせるリマインダーです。

questions.prompt: What should Ms. Ortega do if payment has already been made?
questions.explanation: 本文末に If payment has already been completed, please disregard this message とあります。

title: Employee Referral Program
passage:
To all staff,

Human Resources has reopened the employee referral program for the customer support department. Staff members may recommend candidates by submitting the referral form and the candidate's resume through the HR portal. The bonus is available only if the referred candidate is hired and completes the first 90 days of employment.

The referral form must be submitted before the candidate applies directly on the company Web site.

questions.prompt: What condition must be met for an employee to receive the bonus?

choices.text: The candidate must complete 90 days of employment
The resume must be mailed to customers
The job opening must be cancelled

questions.explanation: 本文に hired and completes the first 90 days of employment とあり、採用後90日勤務することが条件です。

questions.prompt: When must the referral form be submitted?
questions.explanation: 本文末に before the candidate applies directly on the company Web site とあります。

title: Shipping Delay Update
passage:
Dear customer,

Your order of replacement display panels has been delayed because the shipment is undergoing an additional customs inspection. We now expect the panels to leave the port on Thursday and arrive at our warehouse early next week. You will receive a tracking number as soon as the warehouse team scans the shipment.

If this delay affects a scheduled installation, contact your account representative to discuss a temporary rental option.

questions.prompt: Why has the shipment been delayed?

choices.text: It is being inspected by customs
It was sent to the wrong customer
It has not been ordered yet

questions.explanation: 本文に undergoing an additional customs inspection とあります。

questions.prompt: What can the customer discuss if the delay affects an installation?
questions.explanation: 本文末に contact your account representative to discuss a temporary rental option とあります。

title: Meeting Room Booking
passage:
To all employees,

The booking process for conference rooms has been updated. Starting July 1, employees must reserve rooms through the calendar tool instead of sending requests to the reception desk. Reservations made before July 1 will remain valid and do not need to be entered again.

Please cancel any room you no longer need so that other teams can use the space.

questions.prompt: What will employees use to reserve conference rooms?
questions.explanation: 本文に reserve rooms through the calendar tool とあります。

questions.prompt: What is stated about reservations made before July 1?

choices.text: They must be paid for in advance
They must be approved by reception

questions.explanation: 本文に Reservations made before July 1 will remain valid とあります。

title: Supplier Survey Request
passage:
Dear purchasing team,

Please complete the supplier evaluation survey by the end of the month. The survey asks about delivery accuracy, product quality, response time, and billing clarity. Your answers will help the purchasing department decide which suppliers should be invited to next quarter's contract discussions.

If you worked with more than one supplier this month, submit a separate survey for each one.

questions.prompt: What is one topic included in the survey?
questions.explanation: 本文に delivery accuracy が調査項目の一つとして挙げられています。

questions.prompt: Why will the purchasing department use the survey answers?

choices.text: To choose suppliers for contract discussions

questions.explanation: 本文に decide which suppliers should be invited to next quarter's contract discussions とあります。

title: Cafeteria Menu Trial
passage:
To building tenants,

The cafeteria will test a new lunch menu during the first two weeks of August. The trial menu will include several vegetarian dishes and a smaller set of daily specials. Prices will remain the same during the trial period.

Comment cards will be available near the cashier, and feedback collected during the trial will be reviewed before the final menu is selected.

questions.prompt: What will the cafeteria test in August?
questions.explanation: 本文冒頭に test a new lunch menu とあります。

questions.prompt: How can tenants provide feedback?
questions.explanation: 本文に Comment cards will be available near the cashier とあります。
